scripts.check: npm run check:site && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.check:site: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/deploy.mjs && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check scripts/build-docs.mjs && node --check scripts/build-checkout.mjs && node --check scripts/build-packages.mjs && node --check scripts/build-public-package.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-alpha.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-receipt-package.mjs && npm run docs:build && npm run checkout:build && node --check checkout.js && node scripts/check-docs.mjs
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack --cache .npm-cache --dry-run -w zkpay-sh
scripts.cli:demo: node packages/cli/src/index.ts link create --amount 20 --coin USDC --receiver 0x84f --label "API credits" --order-id ord_123 --json
